text: Attorney Roger Roots, representing the imprisoned Joseph Maldonado (known as "Joe Exotic" of Tiger King), submitted filings containing fabricated and inaccurate citations. Roots' paralegal admitted in a sworn declaration that earlier drafts included "AI-assisted research features" from Lexis tools. Roots himself pledged to no longer rely on AI-assisted research summaries. The court imposed a $1,500 Rule 11 sanction and dismissed the case for lack of standing.
ai_system_name: Unnamed generative AI (admitted by counsel; Lexis AI-assisted research features referenced)
deployer: Roger Roots (counsel for Joseph Maldonado / Joe Exotic)
canonical_source_conflicted: Non-existent or misrepresented federal civil rights and animal-law authorities; Fed. R. Civ. P. 11
mitigation_gap: Counsel used AI-assisted research tools without adequate verification; admitted through pledged remedial measures and paralegal declaration.
reliance_or_harm: $1,500 Rule 11 sanction; case dismissed for lack of Article III standing.
